resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def findComplement(self, num: int) -> int:
        return num ^ ((1 << num.bit_length()) - 1)
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses bitwise operations to flip all the bits of the input number, which is the definition of the complement.
